story_title: Nvidia’s Quarterly Profit Hits $43 Billion on Strong A.I. Chip Sales
text:
While Nvidia's soaring profits indeed underscore the growing influence of AI, it's worth questioning if such a concentration of power can be sustainable in the long run. Unlike the dot-com boom and bust of the late 90s and early 2000s (Wikipedia, 2023), technology companies today may have more resources to weather economic downturns; however, relying too heavily on one sector can lead to a bubble that eventually bursts. This rapid growth in AI could also be fueling a new kind of race to domination, potentially stifling competition and sparking an "AI monopoly" era (Hoffman, 2015). It's a scenario worth considering as we watch these figures rise.

Reference:
- Wikipedia. (2023). Dot-com bubble. Retrieved from 
- Hoffman, R. M. (2015). The Innovator's Hypothesis: How Cheap Experiments are Worth More Than Good Ideas. PublicAffairs.
